lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's going on here?

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Ah, this is a strange ritual that has been going on for generations.

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: One of our clan stands on this tower and shouts insults at the other side.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm surprised your Burgher approves of this sort of thing.

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: He suggested stopping it, but there was resistance from the rest of the village. We find it therapeutic.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I watch? I like odd rituals.

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Certainly.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh well, I'd better get going

lines.speaker: Guard (Jatizso tower)
lines.text: YOU WOULDN'T KNOW HOW TO KILL A TROLL IF IT CAME UP AND BIT YER ARM OFF!

lines.speaker: Guard (Neitiznot tower)
lines.text: YOU WOULDN'T KNOW HOW TO SHAVE A YAK IF YOUR LIFE DEPENDED ON IT!

lines.speaker: Guard (Jatizso tower)
lines.text: YAK LOVERS!

lines.speaker: Guard (Neitiznot tower)
lines.text: MISERABLE LOSERS!

lines.speaker: Guard (Jatizso tower)
lines.text: CALL THAT A TOWN, I'VE SEEN BETTER HAMLETS!

lines.speaker: Guard (Neitiznot tower)
lines.text: YOUR MOTHER WAS A HAMSTER.

lines.speaker: Guard (Jatizso tower)
lines.text: AND YOUR FATHER SMELLED OF WINTERBERRIES.

lines.speaker: Guard (Neitiznot tower)
lines.text: AT LEAST WE HAVE SOMETHING OTHER THAN SMELLY FISH!

lines.speaker: Guard (Jatizso tower)
lines.text: WOODEN BRIDGES ARE RUBBISH!

lines.speaker: Guard (Neitiznot tower)
lines.text: AT LEAST WE CAN COOK!

lines.speaker: Guard (Jatizso tower)
lines.text: OUR KING'S BETTER THAN YOUR BURGHER!

lines.speaker: Guard (Jatizso tower)
lines.text: JATIZSO!

lines.speaker: Guard (Neitiznot tower)
lines.text: NEITIZNOT!
